sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 14:30:00');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-01-11 15:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datepart(['year', 'month'], event_time) AS year_month FROM test_dates;
